description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in dark brown leather, featuring deep button tufting along the backrest and inner arms. The sofa has two large, plush seat cushions and a continuous, high backrest that curves seamlessly into the armrests, which are rolled and generously padded. Decorative metal studs line the front edge and armrests, adding a touch of elegance and traditional charm. The legs are short, turned, and made of dark wood, positioned at each corner for stability. The overall silhouette is boxy yet inviting, with ample cushioning for comfort. The leather surface is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly and enhancing the luxurious appearance.
description: A dark brown, leather Chesterfield sofa with deep button tufting, rolled arms, and decorative metal studs, featuring two large seat cushions and short, turned wooden legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rolled armrest, deep button tufting, and the sofa's high, continuous backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the two large seat cushions, button-tufted backrest, and decorative metal studs along the front edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the rolled armrest and tufted details, with the same high backrest profile.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back panel and the sofa's overall width.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform, loose seat cushions and a continuous, deeply tufted backrest; cushions are rectangular and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, high and rolled armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest, heavily padded with decorative metal studs along the front.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, turned wooden legs, one at each corner, dark finish, exposed and slightly rounded.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with deep button tufting, curves smoothly into the armrests, providing a unified and plush appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark brown leather with deep button tufting on the backrest and arms, smooth and glossy finish, accented by decorative metal studs.
